name: Match Group, Inc.
business: Match Group is a leading provider of digital technologies designed to help people make meaningful connections, operating a portfolio of brands including Tinder, Hinge, Match, Meetic, OkCupid, Pairs, Plenty Of Fish, Azar, BLK, and more, each offering a freemium model with premium subscriptions and pay-per-use features.
sellsTo: consumers across demographics, geographies, and intents
users of online dating and social discovery services

exposures.sentence: We are working to further integrate AI technologies into our services through a variety of features to improve user relevance and matching.

catalysts.event: Azar app removed from Apple App Store
catalysts.sentence: On February 22, 2026, Apple removed the Azar app from the Apple App Store.

catalysts.event: Google partnership set to expire in first quarter of 2027
catalysts.sentence: Our partnership with Google entered into in 2024 is set to expire in the first quarter of 2027.

catalysts.event: Issuance of $700 million 6.125% Senior Notes due 2033
catalysts.sentence: On August 20, 2025, we completed a private offering of $700 million aggregate principal amount of 6.125% Senior Notes due 2033.
